match.userMessage:

<CURRENT_SCENE>
{
  "sceneId": "scene_005",
  "sceneNumber": 5,
  "originalScript": {
    "extract": "EXT. BONDI BEACH - SAND - OVERHEAD\n\nFlat-lay overhead. The coral lipstick rests beside the embossed brand mark pressed into the sand. Tiny grains cling to the tube’s matte finish. Shallow depth of field keeps the product sharp against the soft beige.\n\nSCARLETT (V.O.)\nCoral.",
    "dialogue": [
      {
        "character": "SCARLETT",
        "line": "Coral.",
        "tone": "soft declarative"
      }
    ]
  },
  "metadata": {
    "title": "Sand Flat-lay Product Shot",
    "durationSeconds": 7,
    "location": "EXT. BONDI BEACH - SAND",
    "timeOfDay": "day",
    "storyBeat": "Hero product placement with environmental texture"
  }
}
</CURRENT_SCENE>

<SCENE_BEFORE>
(Context for position/lighting continuity only)
{
  "sceneId": "scene_004",
  "sceneNumber": 4,
  "originalScript": {
    "extract": "EXT. BONDI BEACH - SHORELINE - DAY\n\nGolden hour warmth. Scarlett steps into the shallows. A small wave breaks at her ankles. Water droplets catch the light on her calves. She laughs, head tilted back.\n\nSCARLETT (V.O.)\nWear it everywhere.",
    "dialogue": [
      {
        "character": "SCARLETT",
        "line": "Wear it everywhere.",
        "tone": "joyful carefree"
      }
    ]
  },
  "metadata": {
    "title": "Shallows Entry",
    "durationSeconds": 9,
    "location": "EXT. BONDI BEACH - SHORELINE",
    "timeOfDay": "day",
    "storyBeat": "Connects the product to beach lifestyle with water interaction"
  }
}
</SCENE_BEFORE>

<SCENE_AFTER>
(Context for action setup only)
{
  "sceneId": "scene_006",
  "sceneNumber": 6,
  "originalScript": {
    "extract": "EXT. BONDI BEACH - WATERLINE - CONTINUOUS\n\nQuick cut. Scarlett wades deeper. The lipstick tube floats briefly beside her before she catches it. Salt spray hits the lens. Handheld micro-movement follows her turning circle in the shallows.",
    "dialogue": []
  },
  "metadata": {
    "title": "Waterline Interaction",
    "durationSeconds": 9,
    "location": "EXT. BONDI BEACH - WATERLINE",
    "timeOfDay": "day",
    "storyBeat": "Dynamic product interaction in water with handheld energy"
  }
}
</SCENE_AFTER>

<DIRECTOR_STYLE>
{
  "mood": "Fresh, sensory, and effortlessly cool",
  "artStyle": "Modern social-first product photography with tactile, editorial energy. Products shown in real-life context -- hands opening packaging, fingers pressing textures, products on bathroom shelves, kitchen counters, rumpled linen. Close-up detail shots emphasize material and finish. Flat-lays with curated minimal arrangements. Color-matched backgrounds that complement the product. Every frame feels like something you would screenshot and save",
  "lighting": "Bright natural window light with clean directional shadows. Direct on-camera flash for punchy editorial energy on select shots. No heavy diffusion -- let light feel real and immediate. Golden hour warmth for lifestyle moments. High-key and airy overall with pops of contrast",
  "colorPalette": [
    "#FFFFFF",
    "#F0E6D3",
    "#D4536D",
    "#1A1A1A",
    "#E8F4E8"
  ],
  "cameraWork": "Dynamic mix of handheld and locked shots with consistent energy. Handheld with natural micro-movement for lifestyle moments -- hands interacting, daily rituals, real context. Quick-cut to locked beauty frames for hero product shots. Macro details on textures and surfaces. Overhead flat-lays directly above. Eye-level and slightly above angles. Shallow depth of field on tactile details. Energetic pacing -- no lingering, every frame earns its time",
  "referenceFilms": [
    "Rhode Skin Instagram",
    "Glossier Visual Identity",
    "Summer Fridays Campaigns",
    "Drunk Elephant Content"
  ],
  "colorGrading": "Clean and bright with true-to-life color. Whites are crisp, skin tones warm and natural. Minimal processing -- the product looks like it does in your hand. Slight warmth in highlights, lifted shadows keeping everything airy. One accent color pops against neutral base"
}
</DIRECTOR_STYLE>

</ASPECT_RATIO>
